summary: Iteration 47 - Security Command Center (مركز قيادة الأمان) Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Security Stats API returns correct data, 2) Fraud Alerts API works with shared device and concurrent session detection, 3) All Sessions API returns active sessions with employee info, 4) Suspended Accounts API works, 5) Security Log API returns log entries, 6) Access control correctly denies non-STAS users, 7) All 5 tabs (Alerts, Sessions, Control, Suspended, Log) work correctly in UI

fraud_alerts_api.details: Returns list of fraud alerts with severity, title, message, and affected employees

all_sessions_api.details: Returns active sessions with employee_id, login_at, status, employee_name

suspended_accounts_api.details: Returns list of suspended accounts (currently empty - no suspended accounts)

security_log_api.details: Returns security log entries with action, created_at, employee info

access_control_stas_only.details: Non-STAS users (sultan) correctly see 'غير مصرح' access denied message

unauthenticated_access.details: All security endpoints correctly return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests

ui_tests.page_load: PASSED - Security Command Center loads correctly at /device-monitoring for STAS user
ui_tests.header: PASSED - Shows 'مركز قيادة الأمان' with shield icon
ui_tests.stats_cards: PASSED - 6 stat cards displayed (Active Sessions, Alerts Today, Suspended Accounts, Blocked Devices, Logins Today, New Devices)
ui_tests.alerts_tab: PASSED - Shows fraud alerts with severity badges, employee names, and disable button
ui_tests.sessions_tab: PASSED - Table with employee, device, login time, duration, status, and action buttons
ui_tests.control_tab: PASSED - Employee selection list with search, select all, and action buttons (suspend, force logout)
ui_tests.suspended_tab: PASSED - Shows suspended accounts (or empty state)
ui_tests.log_tab: PASSED - Security log entries with action icons, employee names, timestamps
ui_tests.access_denied: PASSED - Non-STAS users see 'غير مصرح' message with 'هذه الصفحة متاحة فقط لمسؤول النظام (STAS)'

critical_code_review_comments: Security APIs correctly implement STAS-only access via require_stas decorator
Fraud detection logic properly identifies shared devices and concurrent sessions
All MongoDB _id fields correctly excluded from API responses
Frontend correctly checks user.role === 'stas' before rendering Security Center
Access denied UI uses proper data-testid='access-denied' for testing
seed_data_creation: No test data modified. Fraud alerts naturally generated from existing login sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security Command Center at /device-monitoring fully functional. All security APIs working correctly. Access control properly restricts page to STAS users only. Fraud detection working (shared device alerts, concurrent session alerts). All 5 tabs (Alerts, Sessions, Control, Suspended, Log) operational.

screenshots: .screenshots/security_center_logged_in.png - Main page with stats and alerts
fraud_alerts_found: جهاز مشترك بين موظفين (Shared device between employees)
جلسات متزامنة من أجهزة مختلفة (Concurrent sessions from different devices)
